apps.name: superportless
apps.subtitle: Keep the exact same localhost origin while switching worktrees per tab.
apps.description: A local dev router that lets each browser tab connect to a different server without changing host or port.
apps.longDescription: vercel/portless is a clever idea, but subdomains change the origin and often force updates to CORS settings, OAuth redirect URLs, and environment configs. superportless takes a different approach: each browser tab can connect to a different local server while keeping the exact same host and port, such as localhost:3000. That means no subdomains, no origin change, and no application config changes. Just open multiple tabs and test multiple worktrees in parallel.
apps.requirements: macOS or Linux. Source builds require Go 1.21+ and a C compiler.
features: Each browser tab can route to a different local server while keeping the same localhost host and port
Avoids subdomains and origin changes that would otherwise affect CORS, OAuth redirects, and environment settings
Lets you test multiple worktrees in parallel without teaching the application about the routing tool
Includes Next.js-specific support for HMR and /api/* routing during development

apps.name: Tater Talk
apps.subtitle: The simplest speech-to-text dictation web-app on Win/Mac/Nix
apps.description: The easiest way to talk to your computer on Win, Mac, Linux, iOS, Android, and the browser with optional bring-your-own premium speech models.
apps.longDescription: Tater Talk is a browser-based dictation app built to make talking to your computer feel simple across Windows, macOS, Linux, iPhone, Android, and the web. The current version adds a polished redesign and bring-your-own API key support for premium speech-to-text providers such as Microsoft Azure and AssemblyAI.
apps.requirements: Chrome on Windows, Mac, Linux, iPhone, and Android.
features: Works across Win, Mac, Linux, iOS, Android, and desktop browsers
Supports bring-your-own API keys for premium speech-to-text models

apps.name: Terminal Alias Manager
apps.subtitle: Manage your shell aliases visually
apps.description: A native macOS app to manage your ~/.zshrc terminal aliases with a clean SwiftUI interface.
apps.longDescription: Terminal Alias Manager lets you visually manage your shell aliases without ever editing ~/.zshrc by hand. Add, edit, delete, enable/disable, search, sort, duplicate, backup, and import/export aliases — all from a native Finder-style interface. Changes are applied instantly with automatic source ~/.zshrc.
features: Add, edit, and delete aliases with validation
Search by name, command, or description
Sort by name, command, or status
Copy any command to clipboard instantly

apps.name: Textream
apps.subtitle: A Free macOS Teleprompter
apps.description: Textream is a free, open-source macOS app that guides you through your script with three modes: word tracking (highlights each word as you say it), classic (constant-speed auto-scroll), and voice-activated (scrolls while you speak, pauses when you're silent). It displays your text in a sleek Dynamic Island-style overlay at the top of your screen.
apps.longDescription: Built for streamers, interviewers, presenters, and podcasters. Paste your script, hit play, and start speaking. Features include real-time word tracking with on-device speech recognition, a Dynamic Island overlay, floating window mode, fullscreen on Sidecar iPad, remote connection for viewing on any device, and Director Mode for live control. Supports PowerPoint notes import, multi-page scripts, and adjustable fonts and colors. Completely private — all processing happens on-device.
features: Real-time word tracking with on-device speech recognition

apps.name: VitePress Mermaid Renderer
apps.subtitle: Interactive Mermaid diagrams for VitePress docs.
apps.description: A VitePress plugin that turns Mermaid code blocks into interactive diagrams with export and theme support.
apps.longDescription: Transform static Mermaid diagrams into interactive visualizations inside VitePress. The plugin adds zooming, panning, fullscreen mode, code copy, theme-aware rendering, and export options for documentation sites that need more than a static SVG.

features: Zoom, pan, and reset controls for complex Mermaid diagrams
Fullscreen mode for distraction-free diagram review
Theme-aware rendering that follows light and dark mode
Export diagrams as SVG, PNG, or JPG

apps.name: Wallnetic
apps.subtitle: Live Video Wallpapers for Mac
apps.description: Transform your Mac desktop with stunning live video wallpapers. Metal-powered, multi-monitor support.
apps.longDescription: Wallnetic brings live video wallpapers to your Mac desktop. Transform your workspace with dynamic, animated backgrounds that run efficiently in the background. Features include multi-monitor support with per-display settings, library management with collections and favorites, smart power management (pause on battery, pause on fullscreen), Metal GPU-accelerated rendering, and native macOS experience with Dark/Light/System theme support. Wallpaper Engine has 40M+ users on Windows - now Mac users finally have a native alternative!

apps.description: A native desktop app for wvw.dev — browse, discover, and install vibe-coded open-source apps from across GitHub without opening a browser.

apps.name: yâdet
apps.subtitle: Remote Cemetery Care Platform
apps.description: A mobile-first cemetery care platform that enables remote grave maintenance. Users can publish care requests, while local service providers accept tasks and complete them on-site — making it possible to manage and monitor cemetery services from anywhere.
apps.longDescription: yâdet is a mobile-first platform designed for remote grave maintenance. Whether you live far from your loved ones’ burial site or simply cannot visit regularly, yâdet connects you with trusted local service providers who complete care tasks on-site. You can publish requests, receive photo updates, and monitor progress — all from your phone, anywhere in the world.
features: Local service providers accept and complete tasks on-site
Photo updates and task monitoring from anywhere
